passing_score_scale: Percentage (75% passing score required per part)
exam_format: Linear (fixed-form, 4 sequential parts — Pearson VUE or online proctored)

testing_centers.notes: Available at Pearson VUE testing centers worldwide. Online proctored option available via ACFE ProctorU. ACFE membership and exam eligibility must be confirmed before scheduling.
Online proctored option available directly through ACFE's ProctorU integration. Requires stable internet connection and compatible webcam.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match ACFE membership registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted. Calculator provided on-screen where applicable. All 4 parts must be passed; parts may be taken in any order. Candidates have 30 months from ACFE approval to pass all 4 parts. ACFE membership must remain active throughout the exam process.
renewal_options: CFE credential requires active ACFE membership renewal every 2 years. 20 CPE hours required annually, including 10 hours in fraud-related topics. Renewal handled through ACFE member portal.

prerequisites.description: Part of the full CFE Exam; ACFE membership required

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between failed attempts on the same part. Each retake requires payment of the per-part retake fee. Candidates have 30 months total to pass all 4 parts after initial approval.

official_study_resources.title: CFE Exam Prep Course
official_study_resources.notes: Official ACFE prep course covering all 4 exam sections

official_study_resources.title: Fraud Examiners Manual
official_study_resources.notes: Comprehensive reference covering all CFE exam topic areas; available in digital and print formats
